Glazer s
Example of the Month
This Top Secret sealed w5 & D" packet with your
newsletter contains a complete "Swipe & Deploy" Sample
of a tested, proven, universally applicable marketing item...
One month it may be a direct mail piece, another something to use at a
website, a seasonal program, a complete teleseminar or webinar campaign, etc.
etc.
Our goal is to get as close to handing you a Turn-key, Ready-To-Use
Marketing/Promotional Tool as is possible, given there are literally thousands of
different kinds of businesses making up Glazer-Kennedy Insider's Circle™
membership. To anyone who uses just one of these a year, this at least
QUADRUPLES THE VALUE OF MEMBERSHIP, and makes every month a quick-to-
moneymaking-action month.
IMPORTANT 	NOTE: 	These 	are 	intended 	ONLY 	for 	use 	of 	GKIC
Members. 	Further, 	whenever 	possible, 	helpful 	vendors, 	suppliers 	or
facilitators 	will 	be 	provided 	should 	you 	wish 	to 	use 	them.
This month's "S & D" example is...

-- 1 of 13 --

. 	>
"Sales 	WithOUT
Sales 	Letters"
The Marketing Media UNDERused in Just
About EVERY Industry
This Month I'm going to hand you a complete, easily duplicatable teleseminar funnel that can
be "S & Ded" for just about any Industry courtesy of Diamond Luxury Member, Teleseminar
Strategist, Michael Cage.
The truth is that teleseminars are misunderstood, misused, and definitely UNDERused in just
about every Industry. This IS especially true in Industries were teleseminars aren't typically used
in, like retail, Dentists, chiropractors, Financial Advisors, business-to-business environments,
etc. etc. This list is endless and this is also very true in Industries where people think they have
"figured-it-all-out."
Teleseminars are smart to use in your business for any of these THREE REASONS:
1) The OBVIOUS: They are a great environment to be able to assemble a large
group of prospects (we've had as many as 7,000 people on GKIC tele
seminars) and offer them a product or service for sale during the call.
OR
2) They are a great Media to deliver information to people just to develop a
relationship with them or present you as the authority in your field.
OR
3) A combination of #2 and #3 above.
The good news is they can be very formulaic. Although I have deviated from this formula from
time-to-time, below are the "7- Steps" I like when delivering a selling (#1 above) teleseminar. ^

-- 2 of 13 --

-
r
r
Step #1: INVITATIONS to register for the teleseminar. This can be via offline or
online. (The samples shown in this month's "S & D" packet are online emails)
Step #2: SQUEEZE PAGE where the prospect can register for the teleseminar
Step #3: CONFIRMATION EMAIL
Step #4: REMINDER EMAILS
Step #5: THE TELESEMINAR Call
Step #6: Post-Call CLOSING EMAIL
Step #7: Post-Call FOLLOW-UP EMAILS
Below (once again courtesy of TeleSeminar Strategist, Michael Cage is a very simple, easily
duplicatable teleseminar funnel. Michael was also kind enough to include some easy
"brainstorm questions" to get your mind engaged and help with the "S & D" process.
SIMPLE INVITATION #1 (BIG IDEA)
Michael's Note: This is a simple e-mail where the trick is to identify one key question your
market has or one key goal they'd like to be able to achieve, call attention to the fact that they
don't know how to do it, and promise to reveal what they don't know on the teleseminar.
Brainstorm Question: What feat, simple to you, would seem remarkable and even amazing to?
your market? I know, I know, 1 know. Your business is different and this won't fit.
To quote Dan quoting the detective from Nero Wolfe ... NUTS! The "big line" in this message is:
If I told you that you had 30 days to generate a 5-figure payday using a teleseminar, could you
doit?
Translated to other industries? If I told you that you had 30 minutes to write an article and get
traffic to your web site, could you do it? (I could do three in that time, read on for more.)
If I told you that you had 7 days to lose an inch of belly fat, could you do it?
Subject: 30 days to your best teleseminar that sells
FIRSTNAME,
Pop quiz.
If I told you that you had 30 days to generate a 5-figure payday using a teleseminar, could you
do it? I have a deceptively simple formula that has let me do just that...
multiple times ... in multiple markets ... even when starting from scratch with no list and no
product.

-- 3 of 13 --

^
Want the details? This Wednesday I'm holding a "teleseminar on teleseminars" where I'll
reveal the formula plus much more. Get all the details and reserve your seat now by clicking on
this link:
http://www.teleseminarsandwebinarsthatsell.com/reRister/
I have 500 lines set aside, and my trainings almost always fill up. Don't wait and risk missing
out. Register now.
Be well,
Michael Cage
SIMPLE INVITATION #2 (MYTH BUSTING)
Michael's Note: This e-mail is another example of drawing attention to a key issue. In this
case, I'm pacing the market who "sees everyone doing teleseminars" or who might even have
done a teleseminar or two themselves. Unless they are regularly banking 6-figures+ from each
teleseminar, I know there are things they don't know. But they don't know they don't know
those things. This e-mail is about drawing attention to what they think they know ... that they
really don't, then telling them to show up for the real deal. One other little "cool trick" I'll point
out. The flowchart - which is killer - is teased as being unavailable unless they both register
and show-up. This idea of forcing your subscribers to choose to attend and to acknowledge
specific value they are looking to receive is VERY IMPORTANT to both your registration and
your show rates. Brainstorm Question: What does your market "think" they know that you can
play "myth buster" around?
Subject: Why so many teleseminars Fail
FIRSTNAME,
I know it seems like everyone and their crazy cousin are doing teleseminars nowadays.
Here's a secret I bet they won't tell you. Most people who do teleseminars make little to no
money at them. And even people making decent profits aren't making nearly as much as they
could be. Want to know why? It's pretty simple really. There is a HUGE difference between
"doing a teleseminar" and "doing a teleseminar that sells." In other words, here's the questions
you should ask yourself:
Do you want people to e-mail you at the end of your teleseminar and say, "GOOD JOB." Or, do
you want them to e-mail and say, "I just ordered, I can't wait to get started, I'm so excited." If
"good job" is enough for you, might as well stop reading now. But if you are excited about the
^
^

-- 4 of 13 --

r
idea of getting large numbers of people to attend and buy because of your teleseminars, you
need to have a formula to do three things:
1. To draw the right kind of prospects to your teleseminar
2. To know the right things to say once they are there
3. And to have the right "leverage" strategies to 2x your sales
I'm going to pull back the curtain on all three - plus much more - this Wednesday at 3pm
Eastern. You'll learn the exact process you can use to create a teleseminar that sells in as little
as 30 days. You'll even get a fancy - and useful - flowchart of the process that you can
download, print out, and keep handy as a reference after the call (please don't e-mail asking for
it, I will ONLY share it with people on the call). I should charge for it... it is that good. You can
use the formula no matter what business you are in, what you are selling, and even if you are
starting an entirely new venture and don't yet have a product or list yet.
Here's the link:
http://www.teleseminarsandwebinarsthatsell.com/register/
All the details you need are on the page, but you need to act quickly. We've reserved 500 lines
for this event, there will be no new lines "magically appearing" ... and my events almost always
fill up because I deliver the goods. Don't miss out.
Be well,
Michael Cage
P.S. Why are you reading this P.S. instead of registering? I deliver meaty training calls and you
will leave it knowing a heck of a lot more than you came in with. Register now.
http://www.teleseminarsandwebinarsthatsell.com/register/
SIMPLE INVITATION #3 (FREQUENTLY ASKED QUESTIONS)
Michael's Note: A great and simple strategy that calls out user-submitted questions and
promises to answer those questions. The idea is to get the prospect to say, "I want the answer
to one of those questions, too." This works great when you ask people what their big desire is
after they register for your teleseminar.
Subject: Is your teleseminar question on this list?

-- 5 of 13 --

" \
FIRSTNAME,
Hi, Michael Cage here from The Real Secrets of Teleseminars That Sell.
I've gotten some great questions about tomorrow's training, and I'm going to take a few
minutes to answer a couple of them now.
Question #1: Will what you're going to talk about on Wednesday work if I don't have a product
yet to sell?
A: Yes, yes and yes. In fact, it's even *better* if you don't. Why? Because I'm going to teach you
a quick and simple way to create a product your market absolutely drools over and get paid in
the process. Of course if you do already have a product, you're going to learn how to sell it
faster, to more people and for more than you thought you could ever charge.
Question #2: Will what you're going to talk about work if I don't have a list to sell to?
A: Yes again. The best part about the strategies you're going to learn is that they're *so*
effective, you can generate huge profits from a very tiny list. 1 built my first 6-figure sales
process from a list of only about 3,000 people. But don't worry if you don't have 3,000 people ...
or even 3. You're going to learn how to build a list you'll profit from for years - from scratch -
using the methods I'll show you Wednesday.
Question #3: I've been doing teleseminars and webinars for years. Is there really anything new
you can teach me?
A: One more time, yes. But don't take my word for it. Check out what adwords expert Perry
Marshall's business manager, Jack Born, has to say.
http://www.teleseminarsandwebinarsthatsell.com/iacks-testimonial/
Be well,
Michael Cage
P.S. And after you watch that quick video, be sure to fill in the
short survey and download your handouts for tomorrow's training.
http://www.teleseminarsandwebinarsthatsell.com/most-important-thinR/

-- 8 of 13 --

SIMPLE 	REMINDER 	E-MAIL
Michael's Note: This simple template can be used to confirm someone's registration and to
remind them that the call is happening. As a registration, the subject should be something like,
"Your call confirmation (details inside)". If it is a day-of reminder, use something like, "It
happens at 3pm EST today!"
Subject: It happens at 3pm EST today!
FIRSTNAME,
The training is today at 3pm EST (2pm CST, Noon PST) sharp. Print your handouts now and have
them with you when you tune in to hear the Real Secrets of Teleseminars that Sell.
http://www.teleseminarsandwebinarsthatsell.com/most-important-thing/
I'm starting right at 3 and plan to fill the full 70 minutes. Be sure to get there a few minutes
early so you don't miss a single second of the content-packed training. Here's your access
information one more time.
Day. Today, Wednesday
Time: 3pm EST
URL-
Access code: #
See you at 3.
Be well,
Michael Cage
P.S. We're going to be covering a lot today on The Real Secrets of
Teleseminars That Sell.
Secrets like ...
1. The unique 6-part structure of teleseminars that sell.
2. How to make massive sales without writing massive salesletters.
3. Why teleseminars often work better than any other selling medium ... even in a down
economy. (And most other times, for that matter.)
4. How to use teleseminars to pre-qualify high-quality, high paying leads and pre-sell them on
doing business with you.
5. No list? No worries. How to quickly and easily use teleseminars to build a list you profit from
for years.
6. How to legally and ethically sell your product for top dollar before you've even created it.
7. How I made $27,310 on the first call ... a call I was sure I botched.

-- 9 of 13 --

k
8. The secret that lets me go from product idea to product for sale in 30 days or less. (For me
it's usually about a week.)
9. The "speed" lesson a judo world-champion taught me the hard way. (And how you can avoid
the same mistake.)
10. And more...
SIMPLE CLOSING E-MAIL
Michael's Note: This template can be used to send the order link you are presenting on the
teleseminar out to your audience via e-mail in addition to revealing it on the call. Note that we
call out the deadline ON EVERY FOLLOW-UP E-MAIL. Optimal offer structure is a lengthy
discussion and not the topic of this funnel, however, know this basic rule: If your offer isn't
unique and special for the people on your teleseminar, and is not attached to urgency of some
sort... you might as well not even do it.
Subject: Here's your link (expires @ Midnight)
FIRSTNAME,
Thanks again for joining me on such a fantastic training. I hope you were as excited to learn the
secrets of Teleseminars That Sell as I was to share them with you. As promised, here's the link
to an exclusive offer you get for being a part of today's training.
http.y/www.teleseminarsandwebinarsthatsell. 	com/offer-summary/
Just a reminder that the offer on this page expires Friday at midnight.
So if what I said on the training clicked for you ... And you're ready to learn these tried-and-true,
real-world strategies, not the dumbed down version floating around everywhere else, act now.
Here's that link again:
http://www.teleseminarsandwebinarsthatsell.com/offer-summary/
Be well,
Michael Cage
P.S. The deadline for the two bonus packages is real. Make sure you
enroll before Friday at Midnight to receive your full benefits.
http://www.teleseminarsandwebinarsthatsell.com/offer-summary/

-- 10 of 13 --

r
SIMPLE FOLLOW-UP OFFER (SWEETEN THE DEAL)
Michael's Note: People who are OK at teleseminars generate 2 "sales rushes" - a sales rush
is a short period of time (often 30-60 minutes) when most of your sales are made - at the close
on the teleseminar and at the deadline for the offer. People who are GOOD generate 3 "sales
rushes" by sweetening the deal by adding new bonuses AND/OR offering a more attractive
payment plan. That's what this template demonstrates in a really simple, easy to duplicate
way. (People who are REALLY GOOD at teleseminars generate 4 or 5 rushes ... but that little
secret is for another day.)
Subject: New payment plan (expires at Midnight)
FIRSTNAME,
A few people wrote in and said they really want to be a part of my next Teleseminars that Sell
training, but they just couldn't make the investment work. So, I've decided to add a special easy
payment option that makes my training more affordable than ever. If you were hesitating or
were worried you'd miss out... don't ...just get over the enrollment page and secure your
membership before Friday at Midnight when this entire offer goes away.
http://www.teleseminarsandwebinarsthatsell.com/payment-plan/
Be well,
Michael Cage
P.S. If you are hesitating, even a little, I want you to visit this page and read the MOUNTAIN of
testimonials from happy clients. Pay special attention to the "from zero to my first 6-figure call"
story, because I believe it will apply to you.
http://www.teleseminarsandwebinarsthatsell.com/stories/
SIMPLE OFFER EXPIRING MESSAGE (OH NO. I'M MISSING OUT)
Michael's Note: Real simple idea here. Trigger an intense fear of loss by pointing out that the
extra special offer (and it REALLY NEEDS TO BE SPECIAL ... not a PHONY SPECIAL OFFER) is goinj
away and their golden ticket is about to turn to mud.
Subject: I'm taking it down (link inside)
FIRSTNAME,

Michael Cage

-- 12 of 13 --

Act Before June 11th And GKIC Members Receive 50% Off
"These 7 New Blueprints Allow Any Business To Make Massive
Sales Without Massive Salesletters In 2010... Guaranteed!"
The Ultimate "What's Working Now"Roadmap To Teleseminars That SellIn AnyBusiness
If you want to put the order-pulling power of teleseminars to work in your business... if you want to do it quickly, within the next 30-60 days... and
if you want to avoid the mistakes that cause most sessions to disappoint and fail, then you need to learn what's working now from the man Bill
Glazer calls, "the Go-To Guy for Teleseminars that Sell."
... that guy would be me, Michael Cage. I created this training, called Sales Without Salesletters, to give renegade marketers and entrepreneurs a
detailed blueprint to the 7 must-use strategies that are producing outrageous results in 2010... in darned near any business type, online or
offline. Let me be clear. These strategies have and will work for information marketers, for coaches and consultants, for offline bricks and mortar
businesses, for service providers, and for professional practices.
Each "Sales Without Salesletters" Strategy includes examples relevant for information marketers, "bricks and mortar" businesses, and
professionals and consultants... plus a handy Process Map you can refer to when putting it to work in your business.
How many of these 7 strategies would you like to profit from in the next 30 days?
▶ Leveraging a little-understood psychological principle in a new way makes this teleseminar strategy turn even minor interest in your offers
into a flood of rapid sales. Strategy # 1 is all about making sales FASTER and BIGGER than ever before... including sales from leads that you'd
usually let go cold. Who else wonts some "found money"in their business?
▶ Generate a "Launch Frenzy" using Sales Without Salesletters Strategy #2... whether you are releasing a brand-new product or service,
pulling an old offer off the shelf, or promoting someone else's stuff... this strategy can 2x your sales. And your buyers will LOVE you for it.
▶ No List?... No Problem! Strategy #3 attracts a flood of new highly-motivated, highly-qualified subscribers to your mailing list... but what really
makes it interesting is that those subscribers turn into buyers in droves.
▶ For current or aspiring Information Marketers: Strategy #4 gives you a 7-step formula... including specific "triggers" that will make or
break your sales... to get paid in advance to create your next information product. This rapid-cash infusion process takes you from from idea-
to-cash-in-hand in as little as 30 days, and can make every new offer you put out sell better.
▶ An unusual strategy for a 13 to 24 minute session... it can be created in a flash, and will outsell competitors who put weeks or months into
their sessions.This Strategy (it's #5 if you are keeping track) works even better when combined with Strategy #7.
▶ The BIG PAYDAY Formula.... Strategy #6 "reverse engineers" teleseminars that generate 6-figures or more every time they run. Even if a 6-
figure teleseminar seems out of reach right now, these Profit Factors can multiply the sales of ANY event you run.
▶ "Hands-Off Automatic Sales Machines"... Strategy #7 makes it simple to use teleseminars as "automatic sales machines." Imagine, the best
sales-producing strategies on the planet running 100% on autopilot. I'll even share my 2 favorite non-obvious ways to use these.
▶ An Essential BONUS Strategy Bundle: A detailed breakdown of the 9 reasons why most teleseminar never make a fraction of the money
they could... and what to do about it. Here's a dirty little secret... most of those teleseminars you see happening make dismal amounts of
money. Because I am behind-the-scenes, I know the difference between what really works and what just looks like it is working. I n this BONUS
Strategy Bundle, I'll share the insider secrets of the difference that makes the difference.

-- 13 of 13 --
